# GrowthKit Studio

> GrowthKit turns a short business brief into a consultant-grade growth report for solo founders, freelancers (ZZP), and small B2B service businesses in Belgium and the Netherlands.

GrowthKit (Entrepreneur Growth Kit) generates a structured growth report from a few inputs about a business. Reports include positioning audit, offer rewrite, ideal customer profile, growth scorecard, 30-day action plan, sales templates, content ideas, and metrics to track.

- What it does: turns a business brief (offer, audience, market, problem, goal, channels, pricing, tone) into a structured growth report.
- Report contents: positioning audit, offer rewrite, ideal customer profile, growth scorecard, 30-day action plan, sales and follow-up templates, content ideas, and metrics to track.
- Output: styled HTML report with PDF export.
- Languages: Dutch, English, French, and German, for both the report and the interface.
- Accounts: sign-in with Google or email (via Firebase) to save reports and re-open them later.
- Pricing: first report free (no card required). Additional reports from €5 (1 report), €20 (5 reports), or €35 (10 reports) via Stripe.
- Made by: jcode.be.

## Key pages

- [GrowthKit home](https://growthkit.jcode.be/): Landing page and starting point for generating a growth report.
- [Sample growth report](https://growthkit.jcode.be/example/): Public example report showing full output quality — indexable and shareable.
- [Terms of service](https://growthkit.jcode.be/terms): Usage terms.

## Company facts

- [jcode.be](https://jcode.be): Independent studio behind GrowthKit. Contact runs through this site.

## Optional

- [Report output overview](https://growthkit.jcode.be/#output): On-page section that summarizes what the generated report includes.
- [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/JCode-gh/BusinessReport): Public repository for the project.
